# From Maths to Evidence Claim

## Weak claim

"These accounts are connected."

## Better claim

"These accounts repeatedly posted the same objects within 120 seconds of one another, producing an edge weight above the 99th percentile of randomized timestamp baselines."

## Best research claim

"The observed cluster is consistent with coordinated amplification because it combines repeated near-synchronous co-actions, reused media assets, low caption diversity, high graph density, and absence of disclosure. The finding is not by itself proof of intent."

## Claim checklist

- state data source
- state time window
- state threshold
- state null model
- state false positives
- state evidence strength
- state limitation
